stemHtml: When should a fuel tank sample be taken on a light aircraft?

options.a: Before the first refuel of the day, to ensure the absence of contaminants.
options.b: Before the first flight of the day. Filling up the tanks reduces the probability of water condensation forming in the fuel tanks.
options.c: Immediately after every refuel, to ensure the grade of the fuel.
options.d: After the last flight of the day. Emptying the tanks reduces risk of water forming in the tanks overnight.
